case_title: BRADSHAW, DREXEL LAW OFF/DREXEL BRADSHAW VS BEHR, ROBERT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEHR, ROBERT
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BEHR, ROBERT AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BRADSHAW, DREXEL LAW OFF/DREXEL BRADSHAW
DEFT'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES & COSTS, GRANTED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRADSHAW, DREXEL LAW OFF/DREXEL BRADSHAW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEHR, ROBERT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BEHR, ROBERT RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BRADSHAW, DREXEL LAW OFF/DREXEL BRADSHAW $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $522.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-13-2003, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-17-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-19-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEHR, ROBERT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ENTERED 10/17/03 IS VACATED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO APPEAR. DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION ***-**-****, OFF CALENDAR NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ENTERED 10/17/03 IS VACATED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO APPEAR. DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
DEFENDANT TO SERVE AND RE-SET FOR TRIAL. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 10/17/03 IS VACATED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BRADSHAW, DREXEL LAW OFF/DREXEL BRADSHAW AS TO DEFENDANT BEHR, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
